playbook.intent: Cold inbound enquiry to signed Statement-of-Work + deposit invoiced OR graceful decline that protects the agency's positioning.
playbook.scope: A cold inbound enquiry leaves the funnel either as a signed Statement-of-Work with deposit invoiced, or as a graceful 'not a fit' note that protects the agency's positioning. Bad-fit leads are filtered before they consume founder time. Exit artifact is either an executed SOW + deposit confirmation, or a logged decline with a written reason and referral note.

success-criteria.criterion: Lead intake form responded to within 24h with qualification verdict
Qualified leads booked into a 45-min discovery call
Sent proposal + SOW within 48h of discovery
Signed SOW with deposit cleared OR documented decline
Pipeline log updated with stage + reason

stage.name: Triage
stage.intent: Filter inbound noise: rank each enquiry by fit signal in under 10 min.

tasks.task: Reply within 24h with verdict (book / decline / clarify)

stage.decision-gate: Advance to Discovery if budget + niche fit clear. Decline if either fails.

stage.name: Discovery
stage.intent: Run a 45-min structured call: pain map, decision criteria, budget signal.
stage.decision-gate: Advance to Scope if budget is at or above minimum engagement and stakeholders identified.

stage.name: Scope + price
stage.intent: Define future state, change strategy, outcome-based price.

tasks.task: Map current to future state delta
Pick fixed-price or retainer pricing model

stage.decision-gate: Advance if scope fits one page and price defensible against outcome.

stage.name: Propose + sign
stage.intent: Send proposal, handle objections, collect deposit.

tasks.task: Send proposal + SOW within 48h of discovery
Handle objections in single follow-up call

stage.decision-gate: Done when SOW signed and deposit cleared. Decline gracefully if stalled beyond 14 days.

stage.name: Decline or refer
stage.intent: Graceful no preserves brand + opens referral loop.

tasks.task: Send templated decline within 24h of verdict
Log decline reason for ICP refinement

stage.decision-gate: Required output: every declined lead receives a written decline. No ghosting.

extra.value: [Outbound prospecting cycles - separate playbook, Long-form RFP responses for enterprise procurement - out of scope]
[Public site or landing page with a contact form, A base proposal/SOW template + deposit-collection workflow]

[Replying to bad-fit leads to 'just see' - burns 4h before declining, Pricing in time-and-materials when the buyer wants an outcome - invites scope creep, Skipping the deposit step to 'get started fast' - guarantees collection problems later]
['Did I qualify against ICP before booking the call?', 'Is the proposal anchored to outcome, not hours?', 'Did I get the deposit before any delivery work began?']

{human: faion get-content inbound-lead-to-signed-retainer --format md, agent: faion get-content inbound-lead-to-signed-retainer --format context, json: faion get-content inbound-lead-to-signed-retainer --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
